caption:
Enterprise integrations don't fail on APIs. They fail in week one when nobody agrees what "done" means.

After onboarding-heavy work, three artifacts save the project:

→ Integration truth map — what syncs, what doesn't, who owns breakage (not buried in a 40-slide deck)
→ Decision log — one line per open call: owner, deadline, blocker (updated before standup)
→ Success metric contract — baseline metric, target by day 30, who signs off

Without these, you're not delayed — you're rebuilding trust in month two.

Save this for your next enterprise kickoff.

What's the one doc your team actually reads in week one?

#productmanagement #integrations #B2B
